title: anthropics/skills
subtitle: Anthropic 官方 · 生产级文档处理技能
why: Anthropic 官方出品，SKILL.md 规范完整，是理解生产级 skill 的最佳样本。
whyEn: Official Anthropic production-grade skills with complete SKILL.md specs — the best reference for learning high-quality skill structure.

title: addyosmani/agent-skills
subtitle: Production-grade engineering skills
why: 覆盖工程实践、代码审查、性能优化等开发闭环，适合直接搬进项目工作流。
whyEn: Covers engineering practices, code review, and performance optimization — ready to plug into real project workflows.

title: vercel-labs/agent-skills
subtitle: Vercel 官方 · 多 agent 兼容
why: Vercel 官方维护，强调跨客户端兼容，是理解 Agent Skills 标准化的好样本。
whyEn: Officially maintained by Vercel with cross-client compatibility in mind — a good reference for Agent Skills standardization.

title: K-Dense-AI/scientific-agent-skills
subtitle: 科研场景专用
why: 专门面向文献阅读、实验记录、数据分析等科研流程，可直接用于研究工作流。
whyEn: Focused on literature review, experiment logging, and data analysis — directly usable in scientific workflows.

title: op7418/guizang-ppt-skill
subtitle: PPT 生成场景
why: 把自然语言需求转化为结构化幻灯片，示例完整，适合汇报、教学等场景。
whyEn: Turns natural-language requirements into structured slides — complete examples ideal for reports and teaching.

title: mvanhorn/last30days-skill
subtitle: 跨平台研究型 skill
why: 聚合多个平台信息做时间窗口研究，适合行业调研、竞品追踪、趋势分析。
whyEn: Aggregates multi-platform information within a time window — useful for industry research, competitor tracking, and trend analysis.
